ocr_findings.description: Answer key line at bottom of image ('問題8-10 イ 問題8-11 ウ 問題8-12 エ 問題8-13 イ') is fully captured in OCR output — no loss.
Image has 'コレが出る！' banner with mascot at top right; OCR captures the text 'コレが出る！' as plain text without the decorative frame — cosmetic only.

reviewer_notes: Page is '出る順！過去問＆完全解説' with 4 numbered exam questions (8-10 through 8-13) covering ファシリティマネジメント, 無停電電源装置, システム監査, ITガバナンス.
